title: jungia polita var. divaricata
intro: Jungia polita var. divaricata, also known as Jungle or Jungle tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic activities. The health benefits of Jungia polita var. divaricata include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
